## User Story
As a service rep, I can see modal context while triaging tickets.

## Requirements
- Render keyboard hints in the modal footer.
- Keep style consistent with design system.

**SME**: Product Enablement Team

## Acceptance Criteria
AC1: GIVEN an open modal
WHEN tab key is pressed
THEN focus remains inside the modal

AC2: GIVEN a screen reader user
WHEN the modal opens
THEN the title and close action are announced

## Notes
Reference docs:
- https://github.com/example/repo/pull/20
- https://wiki.example.internal/display/CRM/Modal+Guidelines
